issues.description: The 10s refetch interval means scene state can lag up to 10 seconds behind backend changes. This is documented as acceptable in user-testing guidance but may surprise users expecting real-time scene updates.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Three.js scene assertions (VAL-THREE-*) cannot be fully validated in headless Chromium due to WebGPU requirements. Unit tests covering data-sync and overlay states provide primary validation; headed/manual evidence is needed for full scene rendering proof.

summary: Wired Three.js cockpit scene to live agent sync with 10s refetch, fixed a bug where new agents weren't registered in the scene due to constant agent set ID, and added NPC driver sync for dynamic population changes. 20-case test suite covers scene population, inspector sync, run/approval propagation, and 4 graceful degradation states. Build passes cleanly.
